commands: GITHUB_TOKEN=$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id esafx/staging/github-clone --region $REGION --query SecretString --output text)

git_pull() { local name=$1 branch=$2; local url="https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; if [ ! -d "$name/.git" ]; then git clone --branch "$branch" --single-branch "$url" "$name"; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "https://github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; git -C "$name" log -1 --oneline; return; fi; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "$url"; git -C "$name" fetch origin "$branch"; git -C "$name" checkout "$branch"; git -C "$name" reset --hard "origin/$branch"; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "https://github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; git -C "$name" log -1 --oneline; }
if [ -d whatsapp-gateway-service ] && [ ! -d whatsapp-gateway-service/.git ]; then rm -rf whatsapp-gateway-service; fi
if [ ! -f whatsapp-gateway-service/.env.staging ]; then cp whatsapp-gateway-service/.env.staging.example whatsapp-gateway-service/.env.staging; fi

python3 -c "import re,pathlib;root=pathlib.Path('/opt/esafx');crm=(root/'crm-service/.env.staging').read_text();wa=root/'whatsapp-gateway-service/.env.staging';text=wa.read_text();get=lambda k: (m.group(1).strip() if (m:=re.search(rf'^{re.escape(k)}=(.*)$',crm,re.M)) else '');pairs={'DB_HOST':get('DB_HOST'),'DB_PORT':get('DB_PORT') or '5432','DB_NAME':get('DB_NAME') or 'esafx_core','DB_USER':get('DB_USER'),'DB_PASSWORD':get('DB_PASSWORD'),'DB_SSL':get('DB_SSL') or 'true','DB_SSL_CA_FILE':get('DB_SSL_CA_FILE') or '/opt/esafx/global-bundle.pem','REDIS_URL':get('REDIS_URL'),'AWS_REGION':get('AWS_REGION') or 'ap-southeast-3','S3_CHAT_MEDIA_BUCKET':'esafx-staging-chat-media-612524168745','S3_CHAT_MEDIA_PREFIX':'chat-media','WHATSAPP_PROVIDER':'neonize','NEONIZE_DATABASE_URL':'/app/data/neonize_sessions.db','APP_NAME':'esafx-whatsapp-gateway','ENVIRONMENT':'staging','DEBUG':'false'}; [ (text:=re.sub(rf'^{re.escape(k)}=.*$',f'{k}={v}',text,flags=re.M) if re.search(rf'^{re.escape(k)}=',text,re.M) else (text:=text.rstrip()+f'\n{k}={v}\n')) for k,v in pairs.items() if v ]; wa.write_text(text)"
